title: Embedding translation fabric
description: Verify that the agent recalls the public vector translation contract and its canonical payload/result pair.
query: memq translation payload result source dimension target dimension retention truncation
prompt: Document the MemQ translation benchmark call. State the public route contract, the source and target embedding profiles, the example payload, and the deterministic result summary.

requiredFacts: POST /mcp/v1/translate accepts a vector plus source_dimension and target_dimension.
Example payload uses vector [0.91,0.42,-0.18,0.07] and translates from 4d to 2d.
Example result returns translated_vector [0.91,0.42] with method truncation and retention 0.5.
forbiddenFacts: Translation requires re-embedding through an external LLM API.
The translation route is only available on gateway.multinex.ai.
